data.title: Coordinate skogix/system-setup/ with parent ansible structure
data.description:
**Context:** skogix/system-setup/ is an ansible submodule (SkogAI/setup) that may overlap or coordinate with parent skogai system configuration.

**Current state:**

* skogix/system-setup/ is a git submodule to SkogAI/setup
* Parent skogai may have its own system configuration
* Recent migration moved ansible roles from skogix to system-setup

**Decision needed:**

* Is system-setup/ personal to skogix or shared infrastructure?
* How does it coordinate with parent skogai configuration?
* Should it remain as submodule in skogix or move to parent level?

**Related:**

* Part of skogix folder integration (#skogix-integration)
* Completed: ansible to system-setup migration (skogix#84-87)
